calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Byrne in Propria Persona.

Mr. Byrne stated that there is an issue of the life estate tenant (Mr. Campos), that the County re-assessed the real estate tax back to date of death in an amount of $11,500.00, that there is a new tax due of $2,500.00 and that Mr. Campos has not been able to deal with it. Mr. Byrne also stated that he may file a petition for instructions as to whether the property should be sold and whether the income can go to Mr. Campos. Furthermore, Mr. Byrne explained work performed and addressed the issue of fees stating that $750.00 is to be paid Mr. O'Keeffe and that 50% of the statutory fees go to Mr. Levi. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
